title: AgentHandoff
description: Ledger event artifact logged at every inter-agent output boundary crossing. Net-new in v2. Makes agent boundaries auditable as first-class events (core principle: agent boundaries are governance boundaries).
$comment: Net-new v2 artifact. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) requires every boundary crossing be captured in the ledger without external context.

authority_level.description: Handoffs are orchestration events. They record, not authorize.

source_agent_id.description: Agent producing the payload. Must reference a registered AgentIdentity.

target_agent_id.description: Agent receiving the payload. Must reference a registered AgentIdentity.

payload_artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact being handed off (Observation, Hypothesis, etc.).

non_authoritative_flag.description: Hard-coded true. Handoffs do not confer authority on the payload.
